title: ebenus hirsuta
intro: Ebenus hirsuta, also known as the hairy cornelian cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Central and Western Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Ebenus hirsuta include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system function. Ebenus hirsuta can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used to make topical creams and salves to support skin health.
